meaning: n.双座四轮轿式马车,分隔车房
examples: While waiting at a traffic light, they saw a black Mercedes coupe on one side and a homeless man begging for food on the other.
Entrechat, coupe, cabriole, chasse were steps codified by then.
hoping to take the coupe-cabriolet market by storm!
Bottom line: You're handling a cool car (read: a BMW Twin Turbo 335 or the Z4 Coupe).
The most striking example of this is the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive.
